titleStmt.title: SII 24.220: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 220. (A.R. No. 52 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: This record, also attributable to Jaṭāvarmaṉ of the previous inscription connected with and engraved below No. 219 and registers a remission of taxes on lands in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, for money received by the bhaṭṭas of Sundarapāṇḍya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a hamlet of Tirunārāyaṇapuram in Alakaṟai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ konerimel koṇ(ṭa)ṭāṉ Alakaṟai nāṭṭu tirunaāraāyaṇapurattuc cuntarapāṇṭiya caruppetimaṅkalattup paṭṭarkaḷukku Iṟaiyiliyāka jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturvetimaṅkalattu cūriyatevanallūr kaṭṭaḷaiyil tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam pa ṟaiyili ma(ṭ)ṭappuṟam Uḷp paṭa Iṟaiyilikaḷ nikki kuṭippaṟṟāṉa nilattil Aṟacil puravari nallūril kār maṟunilam patiṟ
ṟuveliyum Oru pū nilam Aiñcekālum koṭṭaiyil Oru pū nilam kālum kārmaṟu nilam May be restored as patiṉmuṉṟuveliyum toṭṭiyattu kārmaṟu nilam Oṉpatiṟṟu veliyum Oru pū nilam Iruveliyum Āka nilam May be restored as muppatºtoṉpataraiyil ve kapperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa Oru pū nilam Eḻaraiyum nikki kārmaṟu nilam muppattiruveliyum kācu kaṭamaiyum Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa poṉ nūṟṟirupatteṭṭukku
nilamāka mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu candirādityaval celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavittup potuka § Ivai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu tuñcalūr Uṭaiyāṉāṉa periyāṉ colaimalaic cokkaṉ toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 24.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
